about.title: OUR STORY
about.subtitle: Batela Foods embodies local flavors, universal quality, nature, and professionalism.
about.message: Welcome to Batela Foods. Since our inception, our mission has been to elevate local Cameroonian flavors while offering universal quality. We guarantee natural products, sources of vitality, prepared with rigorous professionalism. Discover our passion for excellence and freshness.
about.ceo_p1: We are delighted to welcome you to the BATELA FOODS website, a company founded with passion and determination to share with you the flavors and traditions of our country.
about.ceo_p2: Since our creation in 2021, we have been committed to producing high-quality, authentic, and delicious food products that reflect our African culture and heritage. We are proud of our team, our partners, and our customers who share our vision and commitment.
about.ceo_p3: On this website, you will find information about our products, our values, and our history. We invite you to explore our social media pages, discover our recipes, and contact us with any questions or suggestions.
about.ceo_p4: Thank you for your trust and loyalty. We look forward to serving you and sharing the flavors of BATELA FOODS with you!
about.history_text: Since its founding in 2021, BATELA FOODS has established itself as a benchmark for agro-industrial excellence in Cameroon. Our journey began with a simple but ambitious mission: to reinvent local delicatessen and smoked products with international quality standards.
about.values_text: Authenticity is our compass. We rigorously select 100% natural ingredients to offer healthy, nutritious, and tasty products. Our mission is to enhance the African culinary heritage through innovation.
about.team_text: Behind every Batela product lies a team of passionate individuals, combining traditional expertise with modern food processing techniques to ensure your satisfaction.
about.certifications_text: We apply the strictest food safety standards. Every stage of our production is monitored to ensure optimal freshness and hygiene, recognized by our partners.
about.careers_text: Do you share our passion for excellence and local roots? Batela Foods is constantly growing and looking for determined talents.

saucissons.title: The Art of Tasting Our Saucissons
saucissons.description: Slice thinly and let breathe at room temperature to release all the aromas of our local spices.

saucisses.title: Mastering the Cooking of Your Sausages
saucisses.description: Sear on high heat then finish cooking gently to keep all the moisture and juice inside.
